ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest113EB41F8: You have two Jumbo Furnaces in the Storage Room
They allow place until 9 stacks of ingredients and fuel.
They smelt items quickler than a common Furnace too.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest1CE8D4A9E: It allows to you to go deeper to the Second and Third floors.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest260C0D38E: Antonio will allow you to Craft some Compasses that will help you to find some important places.
To do it just talk with him, select the option "Craft and Item".
Now put the needed materials and press the Craft Button.
Finally when the Crafting Animation finish you can right click on the item placed over the table to obtain it.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest267B945C5: If this is your first time playing, I recommend reading the entries in this Quest Book to learn some of what it has to offer.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest2AAFE5F9C: Antonio will give you information for some important places or challenges that you willd find in the Journey.
Some entries will be lock until you enter to The Nether and The End for first time.
I recommend you check them, maybe you can find some useful information there.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest2D74FB012: The Anvil is disabled on this Modpack.
The new Repair System works as follows:
- First talk with Anna Warhammer and open the Repair GUI
- Now, as Vanilla just place the tool, armor or weapon to repair and the repair ingredient. You will not need to waste XP in the repairments anymore.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest2DC4C9279: The Portal Room will allow you to enter to the different dimensions.
The Nether: Unlocked after obtain 8 different Ender Eyes.
The End: Unlocked after obtain 16 different Ender Eyes.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest2E63FCBDF: Here you can see The Ethereal Abyss portal.
It will stay locked until you find all the 24 different Ender Eyes.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest2EA2FF86A: This place will allow you to storage all your items and cook them too.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest2F35D1A35: The Smithing Table is disabled in this Modpack and a lot of Tools, Weapons and Armors recipes from the Crafting Table are disabled too.
After that place the ingredients and press the Craft button.
When the Crafting Animation ends you will be able to obtain the Spear right clicking on the Blacksmith Anvil.
We repeat the process to Upgrade it to Fortune Spear.
Once more we repeat the process to Upgrade it to Whispering Spear.
If you have doubts about the recipe of one Craft Recipe you can always search it on JEI and press on the item to obtain more information.
Because of this Anna Warhamer will help you with that:
- On one hand, you can craft items using the Crafting GUI.
- On the other hand, you can upgrade items as if using a Smithing Table, preserving the enchantments of the equipped weapon.
In this example the player is going to do this:
- First them is going to craft a new Spear
- After that them is going to Upgrade it to Fortune Spear
- Finally them is going to Upgrade it again to a Whispering Spear
First talk to Anna and select Craft an item!

Craft and Upgrade items
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest307F0A31A: Inside of the Storage Room we can find the Dimensional Storage
This block will allow you to save your items.
By default it has 64 slots of space, but it can be upgraded.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest32A0A94F9: Oriana will allow you to Craft some Pet related items like Saddlers or Horse Armor.
To do it just talk with her, select the option "Craft and Item".
Now put the needed materials and press the Craft Button.
Finally when the Crafting Animation finish you can right click on the floating item to obtain it.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest332B5345B: You can teleport to The Forgotten Realm using the "Teleport to The Forgotten Realm Menu Button".
If you receive damage, you will not be able to use this button for a while.
When ready you will receive a notification ingame.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest35E82D72D: All items related with Pets, like Horse Armors or Pets can't be crafted in a made in a Crafting table or Smithing Table anymore.
Oriana will help you to craft these items and will be give you useful information about beasts that you can find in your journey.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest3A1C4C5FC: This dimension will be your safe zone, free from danger, serving as a checkpoint to progress in your adventure.
In the next Quests I'll explain to you every part of this place.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest3E1E35B51: Here you will find the Waystone which allows to teleport to another Waystones that you will find in other structures in your adventure.
It doesn't cost any XP point but they are not crafteable anymore.
You can activate it right clicking on it, and change the name shift + right click on it
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest3F1F2823C: Here you will find the Experience Obelisk which allows to you to storage XP points.
Very useful in Hard and Nightmare difficulties due the XP lost on death.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest41FEFC863: The Brewing Stand will not work in this Modpack and you will not need Blaze Rods and Nether Wart anymore.
If you have doubts about the recipe of one Potion, you can always search it on JEI and press on it to obtain more information.
The new Enchanting System works as follows:
First you will need to obtain the main ingredients:
- A Potion Ingredient, like a Ghast Tear
- As optional Dragon Breath, Gunpowder, Glowstone and Redstone
In this example, the player is going to Brew a Splash Potion of Regeneration II.
In this case the player obtained a Glass Bottle, a Ghast Tear, Gunpowder and Glowstone.
Once this is done, in Noah's Brewing Interface, you must place the ingredients to obtain the Potion.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest4BC977A8D: The Enchanting Table doesn't work in this Modpack.
If you have doubts about the recipe or the requeriments to unlock an Enchant, you can always search it on JEI and press on it to obtain more information.
The new Enchanting System works as follows:
First, you must unlock it by activating two Triggers for each enchantment:
- Obtain the Enchanted Book with the required level
In this example, the player has obtained one of the 24 Ender Eyes and also the Protection I Enchanted Book.
Therefore, this enchantment has been permanently unlocked.
Now you will see the Enchant unlocked in the Noah Enchanting GUI.
Once this is done, in Noah's Enchantment Interface, you must place the ingredients along with the item to be enchanted and the required XP to finally obtain the enchanted item.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest4E6ED5099: Most of the tools, weapons, and armor can't be crafted in a Crafting Table, but you also can't upgrade them at a Smithing Table or repair them at an Anvil.
Both the Anvil and the Smithing Table are disabled in this modpack.
But don't worry, Anna Warhammer will help you with all of that.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest4F729E372: Your goal in this Modpack is to obtain all the 24 different Ender Eyes to unlock the portal to The Ethereal Abyss.
You can check the full list of obtainable Ender Eyes in the Ender Eyes Menu in your inventory.
In this Menu we can see what Ender Eyes we have obtained.
If we click on any of them we can see a clue on how to obtain it.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest51EDE16FD: Oriana will give you information for some criatures that you willd find in the Journey.
Some entries will be lock until you enter to The Nether and The End for first time.
I recommend you check them, maybe you can find some useful information there.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest524E59BE2: In this place you will find four NPCs,
Each of them will help you in different ways on your adventure.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest5759DBC96: Inside of the structure you will arrive the First Floor, which split in four paths.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest71983AE53: To complete this Modpack you will have to find some important structures.
Antonio will be able to craft some Compasses that will be useful for your journey and will give you useful information about rumors about important places and creatures.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest7A5BE91DA: You have 30 Obsidian Chests to storage all the items that you need in The Forgotten Realm
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.quest7AB5B91EE: In this modpack, you won't be able to &lEnchant&r or &lBrew Potions&r in the traditional way.
Noah the Warlock will allow help you with that.
ftbquests.chapter.welcome.title: How to start
